ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., person, gene, module) */,
  "node_attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes of the node in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the node */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the network (e.g., social, biological, software) */,
  "directed" INTEGER /* Whether the network is directed or undirected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the network */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the network */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the network in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the edge belongs to */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the edge (if applicable) */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of the edge (e.g., friendship, dependency, interaction) */,
  "edge_attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes of the edge in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the edge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the edge was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the edge */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the edge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_centrality" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "page_rank" REAL /* PageRank centrality measure */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality measure */,
  "closeness" REAL /* Closeness centrality measure */,
  "indegree" INTEGER /* Indegree of the node */,
  "outdegree" INTEGER /* Outdegree of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the centrality measures were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the centrality measures were last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who calculated the centrality measures */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the centrality measures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_centrality_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_detection" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node belonging to the community */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the community detection was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the community detection results were last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the community detection */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the community detection results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id", "node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_detection_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the network */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the network */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number for better tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_versions_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network being reported on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., centrality, community detection) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)
